columns.name: TemporaryId
columns.description: The temporary identifier for a finding.

columns.name: CompanyName
columns.description: Name of the company associated with the finding.

columns.name: CompanyGuid
columns.description: GUID of the company associated with the finding.

columns.name: RiskCategory
columns.description: The risk category (e.g., Diligence, Compromised Systems, User Behavior).

columns.name: RiskVector
columns.description: The risk vector slug for this finding.

columns.name: RiskVectorLabel
columns.description: Human-readable label for the risk vector.

columns.name: SeverityCategory
columns.description: Severity category (MINOR, MODERATE, MATERIAL, SEVERE).

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Numeric severity score.

columns.name: FirstSeen
columns.description: Date the finding was first observed (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: LastSeen
columns.description: Date the finding was most recently observed (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: CurrentlyActive
columns.description: Indicates if the finding is currently active.

columns.name: AssetCategory
columns.description: Category of the affected asset.

columns.name: Assets
columns.description: Array of assets associated with this finding.

columns.name: Details
columns.description: Detailed finding data object (CVE info, diligence annotations, remediations, etc.).

columns.name: EvidenceKey
columns.description: Key identifying the source of evidence for the finding.

columns.name: AttributedCompanies
columns.description: Array of companies to which this finding has been attributed.

columns.name: RemediationHistory
columns.description: Remediation history object (last_requested_refresh_date, last_refresh_status, etc.).

columns.name: AffectsRating
columns.description: Indicates whether this finding contributes to the company's overall rating.

columns.name: Comments
columns.description: Array of analyst comments attached to this finding.

columns.name: Duration
columns.description: Number of days the finding has been active.

columns.name: GracePeriodEndDate
columns.description: Date until which the finding is in a grace period and does not affect the rating (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: GuestNetworkEndDate
columns.description: Date until which the finding is suppressed as a guest network (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: ImpactsRiskVectorDetails
columns.description: Object describing which risk vectors are impacted by this finding.

columns.name: NoRvGradeImpactEndDate
columns.description: Date until which the finding has no risk vector grade impact (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: RelatedFindings
columns.description: Array of finding identifiers related to this finding.

columns.name: RemainingDecay
columns.description: Number of days remaining in the finding's decay window.

columns.name: Remediated
columns.description: Indicates whether this finding has been remediated.

columns.name: RolledupObservationId
columns.description: Identifier of the rolled-up observation this finding belongs to.

columns.name: Tags
columns.description: Array of tags applied to this finding.

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name assigned during connector setup.
